raw_source.title: [New York/Shanghai] Foresight Ventures is looking for blockchain anaylsts （Arweave,Avalanche）
raw_source.body:
## About this job
Foresight ventures is seeking qualified candidates for the position of Senior Blockchain Analyst. This position will work closely with a small team to conduct research on the emerging blockchain ecosystems such as Avalanche, Arweave, Dfinity,etc. This role requires excellent analytical and researching skills as long as advanced industry insight.


## Location

- Place of work: New York/Shanghai
- Contact: fv@foresightventures.com

## Job Responsibilities
1. Cover the industry trends, technological breakthroughs and innovative projects on variuos public blockchains.
2. Collect industry dynamics around the world. Form in-depth, research-based investment opinions.
3. Produce research reports regularly to help Foresight establish industry influence.


## Job requirements
1. Fluency in Chinese and English, foreigners preferred.
2. Full of creativity, have a certain level of insight and enthusiasm for the industry.
3. Long-termist, prepared to weather the bear market.
4. Highly self-motivated, practical and rigorous, psychologically strong
5. have 0-3 years of work experience, recent graduates included
6. Graduated from top universities in China and abroad, major unlimited.
raw_source.author: Tug99
